message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #333333
  LifeLineBorderColor #999999
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9F7FF
  BoxBorderColor #B0B0B0
  BoxBackgroundColor #F7F7F7
  GroupBorderColor #B0B0B0
  GroupBackgroundColor #F7F7F7
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9F7FF
}

' --- Upstream ---
box "Upstream" #F7F7F7
participant "C Producer" as U_Producer
participant "C Adapter" as U_Adapter
end box

participant "S Transport" as U_Transport

participant "C Adapter" as U2_Adapter
participant "C Consumer" as U_Consumer

box "JobExecution" #D9FFFF
participant "C GatewayJobHandler" as GatewayJobHandler
end box

' --- Gateway ---
participant "C Gateway" as Gateway
participant "C Producer" as G_Producer
participant "C Adapter" as G_Adapter

participant "S Transport" as G_Transport

box "Downstream" #F7F7F7
participant "C Adapter" as D_Adapter
participant "C Consumer" as D_Consumer
end box

box "JobExecution" #D9FFFF
participant "C DownstreamJobHandler" as DownstreamJobHandler
end box

participant "S Lower Layer" as LowerLayer

' --- Sequence ---
U_Producer -> U_Adapter : publish(command)
U_Adapter -> U_Transport : publish(command)
U_Transport -> U2_Adapter : execute(command)
U2_Adapter -> U_Consumer : handler(command, done)

U_Producer <- U_Adapter : resolves()
U_Adapter -> U_Transport : subscribe(handler)
U_Transport <- U_Adapter : subscribe("response")

U_Consumer -> GatewayJobHandler : subscribe("done")
U_Consumer -> GatewayJobHandler : emit("command", GatewayJobHandler)

GatewayJobHandler -> Gateway : publish(command)
Gateway -> G_Producer : publish(command)
G_Producer -> G_Adapter : publish(command)
G_Adapter -> G_Transport : publish(command)
G_Transport -> D_Adapter : execute(command)
D_Adapter -> D_Consumer : handler(command, done)

G_Producer <- G_Adapter : resolves()
G_Adapter -> G_Transport : subscribe(handler)
G_Transport <- G_Adapter : subscribe("response")

D_Adapter -> G_Transport : getDelay(command)
G_Transport -> D_Adapter : done(response)
D_Adapter -> D_Consumer : done(response)

D_Consumer -> DownstreamJobHandler : subscribe("done")
D_Consumer -> DownstreamJobHandler : emit("command", GatewayJobHandler)

DownstreamJobHandler -> LowerLayer : done()
GatewayJobHandler <- Gateway : done()

Gateway -> G_Producer : resolve(response)
G_Producer -> G_Adapter : handler("response")
G_Adapter -> G_Producer : emit("response", response)
G_Producer -> G_Adapter : onTimeOut(getDelay())
G_Producer -> G_Adapter : unsubscribe()

U2_Adapter -> U_Transport : done(response)
U_Transport -> U_Adapter : done(response)
U_Adapter -> U_Producer : emit("response", response)
U_Adapter -> U_Producer : emit("response", response)
U_Producer -> U_Adapter : handler("response")
U_Producer -> U_Adapter : handler("response")
U_Producer -> U_Adapter : onTimeOut(getDelay())
U_Producer -> U_Adapter : unsubscribe()
@enduml
